excerpt: With the stock firmware and software, developers couldn't modify their AWS DeepRacer devices to use the latest operating systems. Now, developers can upgrade or install a custom operating system (OS) by using a newly released bootloader, which extends the life of these hardware devices. In this post, we introduce the bootloader, discuss how to use it, and share links to a community distribution that uses it.

title: Custom OS installation now available on AWS DeepRacer devices
